h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to identify the objects interacting with the cart based on the tutor's prompts.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Track. [slides the track card flush under the up-arrow tail, sets the bench card off the diagram] Touching — so it pushes.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner actively applies the physical contact criterion to correctly identify and place the track card, demonstrating productive action.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Only the thing touching here pushes. Bench or track?
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor provides a new physical contact criterion to resolve the learner's hesitation, but lacks a clear stock-taking contrast showing the previous route failed.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: Only the thing touching here pushes.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The physical contact criterion is precise, usable, and directly fitted to the learner's confusion between the bench and the track.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no revised frame for the tutor to adapt to.
